properties.title: Andes-virus cluster — MV Hondius cruise (South Atlantic), multi-country
properties.location: MV Hondius; met by CDC at Las Palmas, Canary Islands (2026-05-07); passengers under monitoring across United Kingdom, France, Spain, United States, Argentina, Chile
properties.summary: 11 confirmed and 2 probable/inconclusive Andes-virus cases on the MV Hondius, departed Ushuaia, Argentina on 2026-04-01 with stops in Antarctica, South Georgia Island, Tristan da Cunha, Saint Helena, Ascension Island. CDC met the ship at Las Palmas, Canary Islands on 2026-05-07. 3 deaths reported. Andes virus is the only hantavirus with documented person-to-person transmission.

properties.title: Maine — 1 HPS case (CDC NNDSS, 2026 through wk 20)
properties.summary: 1 hantavirus pulmonary syndrome case reported by Maine to CDC NNDSS, year-to-date through MMWR week 20 of 2026. State-centroid placement; CDC withholds sub-state hantavirus data for patient privacy.

properties.title: Argentina — 102 confirmed HPS cases, 2025-2026 season (BEN SE-17/2026)
properties.location: Argentina (Centro and NOA regions concentrate most cases)
properties.summary: Argentina BEN: 102 confirmed hantavirus cases for the 2025-2026 season through SE 17 of 2026 (frozen snapshot — live parse unavailable this run). Regional: Centro region 54% (Buenos Aires Province 43); NOA 36 cases (Salta 83%).
